ScheduledReports.AggregateReportsFormat_TablesAndGraphs: Display Report tables and Graphs for all reports
ScheduledReports.AggregateReportsFormat_TablesOnly: (default) Display Report tables (Graphs only for key metrics)
ScheduledReports.AlsoSendReportToTheseEmails: Also send the report to these emails (one email per line):
ScheduledReports.AreYouSureDeleteReport: Are you sure you want to delete this report and its schedule?
ScheduledReports.CancelAndReturnToReports: Cancel and %1$sreturn to the list of reports%2$s
ScheduledReports.ReportNameHelpText: Enter a unique name to clearly identify this report. This name is mandatory, and will be displayed in the report.
ScheduledReports.ReportDescriptionHelpText: Enter a description to provide additional context, such as the purpose or usage.
ScheduledReports.ReportDescriptionPlaceholder: Metrics for traffic and conversions sent weekly
ScheduledReports.EvolutionGraph: Show Historical Graphs for the top %s values
ScheduledReports.MonthlyScheduleHelp: Monthly schedule: report will be sent the first day of each month.
ScheduledReports.MustBeLoggedIn: You must be logged in to create and schedule custom reports.
ScheduledReports.PleaseFindAttachedFile: Please find your %1$s report for %2$s in the attached file.
ScheduledReports.PleaseFindBelow: Please find below your %1$s report for %2$s.
ScheduledReports.PluginDescription: Create custom reports and schedule them to be emailed daily, weekly or monthly to one or several people. Several report formats are supported (html, pdf, csv, images).
ScheduledReports.ReportIncludeNWebsites: The report will include main metrics for all websites that have at least one visit (from the %s websites currently available).
ScheduledReports.ReportMissingName: To create a report, please include a %1$sName%2$s.
ScheduledReports.ReportMissingReports: To create a report, please include at least %1$sone report%2$s.
ScheduledReports.ReportsIncludedHelp: Choose at least one report to include in this scheduled report.
ScheduledReports.SelectedReportsHelp: Drag and drop to re-order the report sections.
ScheduledReports.Segment_Deletion_Error: This segment cannot be deleted or made invisible to other users because it is used to generate email report(s) %s. Please retry after removing this segment from this report(s).
ScheduledReports.HelpSegmentManagement: You can select an existing custom segment to apply to data in this scheduled report. You may create and edit custom segments in the dedicated segments management page %1$s(click here to open)%2$s.
ScheduledReports.SegmentAppliedToReports: The segment '%s' is applied to the reports.
ScheduledReports.ThereIsNoReportToManage: There is no report to manage for website %s
ScheduledReports.TopLinkTooltip: Create Email Reports to get Matomo stats delivered to your email or your customers' address automatically!
ScheduledReports.WeeklyScheduleHelp: Weekly schedule: report will be sent on Monday of each week.
ScheduledReports.UnsubscribeReportConfirmation: Are you sure you would like to unsubscribe from the report %1$s?
ScheduledReports.SuccessfullyUnsubscribed: You have been successfully unsubscribed from the report %1$s.
ScheduledReports.UnsubscribeFooter: To unsubscribe from this report please follow this link: %1$s
ScheduledReports.NoTokenProvided: No token was provided in the URL
ScheduledReports.NoSubscriptionFound: No subscription found. Maybe the report was already unsubscribed or removed.
ScheduledReports.EvolutionGraphsShowForEachInPeriod: Evolution graphs show the evolution for %1$seach day%2$s in the last %3$s
ScheduledReports.EvolutionGraphsShowForPreviousN: Evolution graphs show the evolution over the previous N %s
ScheduledReports.ScheduleReportPeriodHelp: The period of data covered by this report. By default this is the same as the report schedule, so if the report is sent weekly, it will contain information regarding the last week.
ScheduledReports.ScheduleReportPeriodHelp2: You can change this, however, if you want to see different information and still retain the report schedule. For example, if the report schedule is weekly, and the report period is 'day', you will get information for the last day, every week.
ScheduledReports.ManageTooltip1: Stay informed wherever you work. Send reports directly to Email, SMS, Slack, or Microsoft Teams.
ScheduledReports.ManageTooltip2: Scheduled reports are automatically sent with the data for the configured reporting schedule:
ScheduledReports.ManageTooltip3: Use Download preview or Send preview to preview the report structure using the date currently selected in the calendar.
ScheduledReports.LearnMoreTooltip: Learn more about Scheduled Reports on our %1$sKnowledge Base article.%2$s
ScheduledReports.PeriodTooltip1: Daily: sent every day at the configured time.
ScheduledReports.PeriodTooltip2: Weekly: sent on Monday of each week.
ScheduledReports.PeriodTooltip3: Monthly: sent on the first day of each month.
ScheduledReports.CreateTooltip: You can send scheduled reports via Email, SMS, Slack, or Microsoft Teams. Choose your preferred delivery method when creating or updating a report.
ScheduledReports.ReportWillBeSentAt: The report will be sent at the selected hour in your local time zone.
ScheduledReports.NoteDeliveryTime: Note: The exact delivery time may vary depending on report generation.
ScheduledReports.WidgetsNotMappedToReports: Some dashboard widgets could not be mapped to scheduled report items: %s.
ScheduledReports.ExportDashboardPrepare: This report is being prepared from your dashboard "%s".
ScheduledReports.ExportDashboardWidgetsConvertedAutomatic: The widgets from your dashboard have been converted into report sections automatically.
ScheduledReports.ExportDashboardEmailEnabledByDefault: Email delivery is enabled by default. To turn it off, change "%1$s" to "%2$s".
ScheduledReports.ExportDashboardDownload: Once you create the report, you will be able to download it.
ScheduledReports.ExportDashboardReportDescription: This report was automatically generated from the dashboard "%1$s" on %2$s
ScheduledReports.ExportDashboardInvalidDashboard: This dashboard could not be exported. It may not exist anymore, or it has no widgets that can be converted into scheduled report items.
